title: Module Build Packet (L5 manifest)
description: Canonical Module Studio Assemble output. A build packet references an archetype (L4), a theme preset (L0/Theme), and arranges PUBLISHED blocks (L3) into the archetype's zones, binding data to named slots. It carries ZERO style: no hex/px literals, no inline style, no HTML, no density override — every visual parameter is owned by the Theme/token authority, not the manifest. Deep literal checks are enforced by mom/tools/release/check_module_manifest.php; this schema fixes the structural shape.

moduleArchetype.description: archetype_key of the L4 archetype this module instantiates (graphics_module_archetype).

themePresetKey.description: preset_key of the theme this module renders under (graphics_theme_preset). Visual identity lives here, never inline in the manifest.

zones.description: archetype zone name -> ordered list of block placements. Each placement is either a published block_key (string) or an object binding slots/data to a block.

oneOf.description: A published L3 block reference (block_key or block-instance id).

slots.description: Named slot -> content/binding. No raw HTML, no inline style.

data.description: Data binding for the block (e.g. dataSource.api + params). No style.

a11y.description: Per-placement accessibility overrides (role/label) when the block contract allows.

a11yProfile.description: Module-level accessibility contract (landmarks, focus order). Required by check_module_manifest for newly authored packets.

previewScene.description: PreviewScenes key used to render this manifest in simulation before submit.
